query:
-- Match unmatched services by locationAddress against matched services with same address
-- Only use addresses that aren't generic placeholders
UPDATE services AS u
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    LOWER(TRIM(locationAddress)) AS norm_addr,
    customerExternalId
  FROM services
  WHERE customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
    AND locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND locationAddress != ''
    AND locationAddress NOT LIKE '%Unknown%'
    AND locationAddress NOT LIKE '%unknown%'
  GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(locationAddress)), customerExternalId
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customerExternalId) = 1
) AS addr_map ON addr_map.norm_addr = LOWER(TRIM(u.locationAddress))
SET u.customerExternalId = addr_map.customerExternalId
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND u.locationAddress != ''
  AND u.locationAddress NOT LIKE '%Unknown%';

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS rows_updated_address_match;

-- How many unmatched remain?
SELECT COUNT(*) AS still_unmatched FROM services WHERE customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '';
